name: Yang Xiao Long \\ Branwen Betrayal
description:
"You're not my sibling, so you better start talking."

[REQUEST] After arriving to Atlas, Yang managed to overhear a conversation between Ironwood and Qrow that revealed the fact that one of her supposed friends from Beacon was the child of Raven Branwen, the mom that abandoned her at birth. Furious at the revelation, she opts to go on a mission alone with them to get some good alone time with them far out in the snowy fields of Solitas in order to talk.

Another request bot out! I really liked the idea, though the image that was provided by Resh0101 when requesting had her V7 look when I was thinking of making this into a Beacon bot. No problems, however, I managed to adapt it. In this scenario, user is the child of Raven, whether that's adoptive or not is up to you, I'm still taking off the limitless tag for it regardless.

I hope you guys enjoy it and look forwards to the next bot!

27/01- Hey, I simply updated the first message so it reads better. I wasn't too happy with the writing on it so I updated it.

Art source: @issikiiiiiii on Twitter
All characters are 18+
creator: Medium_Smokes
